strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: Your Google Ads CPL has doubled to ₹4,977, and with a pathetic 6% spend generating only 1% leads, your CVR is in the gutter. Cut the fat on underperforming campaigns and aggressively pivot your budget to TOFU strategies that can drive meaningful lead volume or risk total ROI failure.

recommendations.detail: 2 ad groups in 'DM_Branded_Search_11th_June_2024 #d2r|dt7-dm_branded_search_11th_june_2024' with <50 weekly impressions each. Combined: 75 impressions, 0.0 conversions, ₹1,768 spend. Too fragmented for smart bidding to optimize.
recommendations.action: Merge 2 low-volume ad groups into one. Consolidates conversion data for better bidding signals. Combine best-performing keywords and ad copy from each.
recommendations.expected_impact: More conversion data per ad group -> exits learning limited faster, better bid optimization
recommendations.execution_note: Requires merging keywords, ad copy, and pausing old ad groups

recommendations.execution_note: Requires manual keyword migration and new ad copy creation
